calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Attorneys' Fees And Costs Pursuant To Ccp 405.38
Off Calendar Aug-22-2013 Advanced From Aug-22-13 To Aug-22-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 613
MINI MINUTES:
